title: Tiny Dancer
meaning_summary: This recording remains durable because its build, melody, and emotional payoff continue to reward repeat listening.
revenue_drivers: Long-tail streaming and classic pop playlists sustain catalog value.
Scene-setting sync use and film association keep the song discoverable.
Listener familiarity across generations helps maintain replay demand.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Tiny Dancer is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
